acceptance_answers.can_github_become_first_production_gover: Yes, GitHub is the best first candidate, but it remains PARTIAL until production credential authority and a governed live connector implementation exist.

already_satisfied_controls: GitHub connector is defined in PB-038.
PB-039 proves dry-run orchestration can include GitHub without live mutation.

audit_record_rules: audit record must be generated before mutation
raw credentials and tokens must never be logged
approval_reference is required for approval_required capabilities
policy_reference must identify the controlling USBAY policy

generated_pr_body:
## PURPOSE
PB-041 defines GitHub connector authority, permission governance, credential governance, audit requirements, and fail-closed conditions before any production GitHub connector is implemented.

## RISK
GitHub can mutate branches, pull requests, releases, rulesets, branch protections, and secrets. Without scoped credentials, approvals, audit records, and fail-closed handling, a production connector could bypass USBAY governance.

## POLICY LINK
AGENTS.md fail-closed, audit-first engineering, branch governance, human oversight, network governance, and secret/data hygiene rules. PB-040 evidence: governance/evidence/pb040/connector_readiness_report.json.

## REQUIRED APPROVALS
USBAY-AUDIT and USBAY-GLOBAL23 review are required before merge. No live GitHub mutation, production credential storage, external API call, admin merge, or branch protection bypass is permitted.

## GOVERNANCE CHECKS
Validation must prove JSON parses, generated metadata is present, required PR body sections exist, diff hygiene passes, conflict markers are absent, and GitHub production readiness remains fail-closed when credential and implementation evidence are missing.

## AUDIT
PB-041 generates governance/evidence/pb041/github_connector_authority_report.json and governance/evidence/pb041/github_connector_authority_summary.md with authority models, permission matrix, credential governance, audit requirements, fail-closed conditions, and onboarding checklist.

## IMPACT
USBAY can move GitHub toward first production-governed connector status through an evidence-bound checklist while preserving PARTIAL status until production evidence exists.

## Decision
VERIFIED

## Status
READY_FOR_REVIEW

fine_grained_token_authentication.authority_scope: repository-scoped token for minimal capability pilot

github_app_authentication.authority_scope: repository-scoped installation preferred; organization-scoped installation only when all repositories are explicitly governed
github_app_authentication.credential_type: app_id, installation_id, private_key stored outside repository
requirements: private key stored in approved secret manager
installation permissions mapped to capability matrix
audit attribution records GitHub App slug and installation id hash
ruleset and branch protection compatibility evidence

minimum_production_onboarding_checklist: Create repository-scoped GitHub App installation or fine-grained token with least privilege.
Store credential outside repository in approved secret manager or protected GitHub environment secret.
Record credential authority owner, scope, expiration, and rotation plan.
Implement production connector behind the PB-038 policy gate.
Map every enabled capability to github_permission_matrix.
Require human approval for branch, PR, merge, release, ruleset, branch protection, and secret actions.
Write audit record before every mutation.
Capture GitHub response receipt after every successful mutation.
Fail closed on GitHub API failure, audit write failure, permission mismatch, or missing approval.
Validate with a non-destructive pilot capability before enabling broader production actions.
missing_controls: Production GitHub App or fine-grained token credential evidence.

production_credential_governance.credential_authority: Repository-scoped GitHub App installation or fine-grained token controlled by approved USBAY authority; no production credential may be stored in repository.
expiration_policy: fine-grained token must have explicit expiration
classic PAT emergency exception must have short expiration
GitHub App installation tokens must be short-lived
incident_response_path: require human governance approval before reactivation
revocation_procedure: remove or rotate secret manager entry
rotation_requirements: rotate GitHub App private key at least every 90 days
rotate fine-grained token at or before expiration
storage_requirements: store credentials only in approved external secret manager or GitHub Actions secrets with scoped environment protection
store only credential reference hashes in audit records

title: GitHub Connector Authority
